ddls:
CREATE TABLE "politicians" (
  "politician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each politician */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the politician */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the politician */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the politician */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the politician */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the politician */,
  "highest_education_level" TEXT /* Highest education level of the politician */,
  "term_as_chair" TEXT /* Term(s) served as chair */,
  "birthplace" TEXT /* Birthplace of the politician */,
  "county_of_residence" TEXT /* County of residence at the time of election */,
  "profession" TEXT /* Profession at the time of election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("politician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_politicians_birthplace FOREIGN KEY ("birthplace") REFERENCES birthplaces ("birthplace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_politicians_profession FOREIGN KEY ("profession") REFERENCES professions ("profession_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_politicians_county_of_residence FOREIGN KEY ("county_of_residence") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "politician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the politician serving the term */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the term started */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the term ended */,
  "term_description" TEXT /* Description of the term */,
  "term_type" TEXT /* Type of term */,
  "committee_assignments" TEXT /* Committee assignments during the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terms_politician_id FOREIGN KEY ("politician_id") REFERENCES politicians ("politician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "birthplaces" (
  "birthplace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each birthplace */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of birth */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of birth */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of birth */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the birthplace */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the birthplace */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Standardized country code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("birthplace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "county_code" TEXT /* Standardized county code */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "professions" (
  "profession_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profession */,
  "profession_description" TEXT /* Description of the profession */,
  "profession_category" TEXT /* Category of the profession */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profession_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_years" (
  "election_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "politician_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile */,
  "politician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the politician this profile belongs to */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the politician */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the politician's biography */,
  "quotes" TEXT /* Notable quotes from the politician */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the politician's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_politician_profiles_politician_id FOREIGN KEY ("politician_id") REFERENCES politicians ("politician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "politician_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Additional information about the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "politician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the politician in the election */,
  "election_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election year */,
  "votes_received" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the politician */,
  "election_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the election (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "margin_of_victory" INTEGER /* Margin of victory in the election */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent in the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_politician_id FOREIGN KEY ("politician_id") REFERENCES politicians ("politician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_year_id") REFERENCES election_years ("election_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "politician_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "politician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the politician */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role held by the politician */,
  "role_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the role */,
  "role_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_politician_roles_politician_id FOREIGN KEY ("politician_id") REFERENCES politicians ("politician_id")
)
column_names: Date of birth of the politician
Highest education level of the politician
County of residence at the time of election
Profession at the time of election
ID of the politician serving the term
State where the county is located
Unique identifier for each election year
ID of the politician this profile belongs to
Unique identifier for each election result
ID of the politician in the election
Number of votes received by the politician
Outcome of the election (e.g., Win, Loss)
Margin of victory in the election
Description of the role held by the politician
